sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ هِيَ الرُّكْنُ الثَّانِي مِنْ أَرْكَانِ الْإِسْلَامِ الْخَمْسَةِ الْعَظِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Namaz je drugi stub od pet velikih stubova islama.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer is the second pillar of the five great pillars of Islam.

sentences.arabic: سُئِلَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ: أَيُّ الْعَمَلِ أَحَبُّ إِلَى اللهِ؟
sentences.translation: Poslanik, s.a.v.s., je upitan: 'Koje djelo je Allahu najdraže?'
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet ﷺ was asked: 'Which deed is most beloved to Allah?'

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: «الصَّلَاةُ عَلَى وَقْتِهَا» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ مَوَاقِيتِ الصَّلَاةِ].
sentences.translation: Rekao je: 'Namaz u njegovom vremenu' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o vremenima namaza].
sentences.translationEn: He said: 'Prayer at its proper time' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Prayer Times].

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الْمُسْلِمُ مِنَ الصَّلَاةِ النِّظَامَ وَتَقْدِيرَ الْوَقْتِ فِي حَيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman kroz namaz uči o redu i poštovanju vremena u svom životu.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim learns discipline and the appreciation of time in his life through prayer.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا نُصَلِّي، نَقِفُ بَيْنَ يَدَيِ اللهِ بِخُشُوعٍ وَتَوَاضُعٍ تَامٍّ.
sentences.translation: Kada klanjamo, stojimo pred Allahom sa potpunom skrušenošću i poniznošću.
sentences.translationEn: When we pray, we stand before Allah with complete submissiveness and humility.

sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ تُطَهِّرُ الْقَلْبَ وَتَنْهَى عَنِ الْفَحْشَاءِ وَالْمُنْكَرِ.
sentences.translation: Namaz čisti srce i odvraća od razvrata i zla.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer purifies the heart and restrains one from shameful and evil deeds.
